ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job posting */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company posting the job */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., on-site, remote) */,
  "employees" REAL /* Number of employees required for the job */,
  "followers" REAL /* Number of followers for the job posting */,
  "applicants" INTEGER /* Number of applicants for the job */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the job (e.g., Airlines/Aviation, E-learning) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the job (e.g., entry level, mid-senior level) */,
  "involvement" TEXT /* Involvement of the job (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "salary_range_min" REAL /* Minimum salary range for the job */,
  "salary_range_max" REAL /* Maximum salary range for the job */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) for the job location */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting applications */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job responsibilities and requirements */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered with the job (e.g., health insurance, retirement plans) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job posting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job posting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "company_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the company's logo */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "company_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_location" TEXT /* Main location of the company */,
  "company_industry" TEXT /* Primary industry of the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the industry information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Requirement for the job (e.g., analytics, communication) */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., skill, qualification, certification) */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requirement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_requirements_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "skill" TEXT /* Skill of the candidate (e.g., data analysis, problem solving) */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency in the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience with the skill */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was added to the candidate's profile */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the skill was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_skills_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the candidate */,
  "candidate_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "candidate_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "candidate_location" TEXT /* Location of the candidate */,
  "candidate_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the candidate's professional background */,
  "candidate_experience_years" INTEGER /* Total years of professional experience */,
  "candidate_education" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "candidate_portfolio" TEXT /* URL or path to the candidate's portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate's profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, rejected, accepted) */,
  "application_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "skill" TEXT /* Skill analyzed */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the skill across job postings */,
  "analysis_period" TEXT /* Period over which the analysis was conducted (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_analysis_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)
